summary: Frontend testing for new Seasons page search feature. All 22 test cases PASSED. Verified: 1) Search country shows search results section with flag, name, best months, season status. 2) Displays 5 alternate destinations with visa type badges. 3) Visa info card shows Visa Type, Documents Needed, Processing Time, Cost Estimate with correct defaults based on visa_type. 4) Different visa types work correctly: Japan=Visa Required, Thailand=Visa on Arrival, Maldives=Visa Free. 5) Close button (X) clears search results. 6) Clicking country cards/alternates opens detail modal. 7) Wishlist buttons trigger auth modal for unauthenticated users.

console_warnings.warning: Encountered two children with the same key
console_warnings.notes: React key collision warning - doesn't break functionality but should be fixed for code quality

passed_tests: TEST 1: Seasons page loaded successfully
TEST 2: Search dropdown appeared with Japan option
TEST 3: Search results section appeared
TEST 4: Japan country card found with correct data-testid
TEST 5: Country flag displayed
TEST 6: Best months info displayed
TEST 7: Season status displayed
TEST 8: Visa information card found
TEST 9: Japan shows 'Visa Required' (correct visa type)
TEST 10: Documents Needed section found
TEST 11: Processing Time section found
TEST 12: Cost Estimate section found
TEST 13: Found 5 alternate destinations
TEST 14: Alternate destinations show visa type badges
TEST 15: Close button (X) found
TEST 16: Close button cleared search results
TEST 17: Thailand shows 'Visa on Arrival' (correct visa type)
TEST 18: Maldives shows 'Visa Free' (correct visa type)
TEST 19: Country detail modal opened when clicking searched country card
TEST 20: Country detail modal opened when clicking alternate destination
TEST 21: Wishlist toggle button found and working (triggers auth for unauthenticated)
TEST 22: 'View Full Country Details' button opens modal
action_items: MINOR: Fix React key collision warning in CountryDetailModal component - 'Encountered two children with the same key'
critical_code_review_comments: Seasons.js search feature properly implemented with correct data-testid attributes for testing
Visa info defaults correctly implemented based on visa_type (visa_free, visa_on_arrival, e_visa, visa_required)
Alternate destinations correctly filtered and limited to 5 results
CountryDetailModal has React key collision warning - should review component to ensure unique keys
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seasons page search feature fully tested and working. Search for country shows: 1) Searched country card with flag, name, best months, season status 2) 5 alternate destinations with visa badges 3) Detailed visa info with Documents, Processing Time, Cost based on visa_type. Clicking cards/alternates opens CountryDetailModal. Wishlist button triggers auth for unauthenticated users. Minor React key collision warning in CountryDetailModal needs fixing.

visa_required.documents: 6 items (passport, application form, photos, bank statements, travel insurance, flight bookings)

visa_on_arrival.documents: 4 items (passport, photos, hotel booking, return ticket)
